/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -march=native -flto -DNDEBUG -Wall -Wextra -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/quarto-ai.dir/link.d "CMakeFiles/quarto-ai.dir/src/main.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/quarto-ai.dir/src/network.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/quarto-ai.dir/src/client.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/quarto-ai.dir/src/choker_joker.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/quarto-ai.dir/src/search.cpp.o" -o quarto-ai
